canonical_definition: Visual question answering model (Flan-T5xxl) used as a visual information extractor to generate attribute descriptions from images, such as wing color or head pattern.
papers: An Image Is Worth 1000 Lies: Transferability of Adversarial Images across Prompts on Vision-Language Models
Democratizing Fine-grained Visual Recognition with Large Language Models
